posts.author: _Stefan (Stefan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Copy Columns from parent elements → Copy ALL Button

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360011905480-All-about-subitems#copy_parent_columns

Please Add an simple “ALL” Button - so I dont have to click 20 times all the single Checkboxes!

What are you trying to achieve

Speed up the creating colums for subitems!
